topics: Mechatronics Design System and Interfacing. Introduction to Mechatronics. Historical development and definitions of mechatronic systems. Key elements of Mechatronic Systems. Functions of mechatronic systems. Design approach

Sensors and Transducers-Static and dynamic performance characteristics
External sensors and microsensors. Mechatronic System Controllers
